name: The Little Couple
overview: Bill Klein and Jen Arnold are just like your average couple – except they’re both under 4 feet tall! They’ve faced not only the struggles of two little people in an average-sized world, but are starting a family with their two adorable, adopted children.

trailers.title: Here's What's Coming Up This Season On The Little Couple | RETURNS Tue Sep 19 at 9/8c
